perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a modern kitchen where a man (Tim) is standing; a hand enters the frame from the right and gives him a glass of water. (2) Tim drinks the water and reacts with surprise and satisfaction. (3) The camera focuses on a sleek black touch-screen faucet over a kitchen sink, demonstrating how to select temperatures. (4) An infographic appears on screen showing the five layers of the filtration system. (5) Tim opens the cabinet under the sink to reveal a white, compact water purification unit. (6) He demonstrates the ease of changing the filter by twisting and pulling a cylindrical component. (7) The video ends with Tim gesturing towards the sink while talking directly to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic pop-style background music plays continuously throughout the video. (2) An off-screen male voice starts the conversation, followed by a male speaker (Tim) who has a bright, professional, and enthusiastic tone. (3) Sound effects include the crisp 'beep' of a touch screen interface and the clear sound of water flowing into a glass. (4) The audio maintains a high vocal ratio where Tim's fast-paced explanation of technical features is the primary focus, supported by the steady rhythm of the music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '欸! 老闆' (Hey! Boss) and variety-show style captions like '喝起來特別好喝' (Tastes particularly good). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '#是風水比較好嗎?' (Is the Feng Shui better?), '智慧觸控水龍頭' (Smart Touch Faucet), and '120度旋轉' (120-degree rotation). (3) Technical Specs: 'AquaPure H-PURE 15G', '五重過濾' (Five-stage filtration), '316不鏽鋼熱膽' (316 Stainless Steel Heater). (4) Call to Action: '點資訊欄看更多!' (Check the info section for more!)

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a 'Hook -> Feature Demonstration -> Technical Explanation -> Maintenance/CTA' flow.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim) is on screen, and one pair of male hands is visible in the opening shot.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged male with glasses, wearing a flat cap and a dark maroon 'ROOTS' branded sweatshirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern kitchen with white tiled walls, a stainless steel sink, and a refrigerator visible in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, even studio lighting simulating a home kitchen environment.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut between voice-over segments with continuous BGM

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional review and demonstration of the AquaPure H-PURE 15G water purifier. It aims to persuade the audience of the product's superior water quality, space-saving design, and ease of maintenance using a trusted tech-influencer persona.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker explicitly names the brand, demonstrates its features in detail, and includes a call to action to check for more information, which are hallmarks of a sponsored review.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Tim's characteristic '3C意思Tim哥' greeting style and use of variety-show style on-screen text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses high-frequency cuts and text overlays typical of short-form social media marketing in East Asia to maintain viewer engagement.
